title: Job Interview: B2 Level
opening: Good morning, thanks for coming in. Please, tell me a bit about yourself.

t1.prompt: Good morning, thanks for coming in. Please, tell me a bit about yourself.
t1.promptTranslation: Good morning, thanks for coming in. Please, tell me a bit about yourself. — Good morning, thanks for coming in. Please, tell me a bit about yourself.

t2.prompt: That sounds interesting. Could you elaborate a bit more on your professional experience and how it aligns with this role?
t2.promptTranslation: That sounds interesting. Could you elaborate a bit more on your professional experience and how it aligns with this role? — That sounds interesting. Could you elaborate a bit more on your professional experience and how it aligns with this role?

t3.prompt: Excellent. What would you consider your strongest asset for this particular position, and could you give an example of how you've demonstrated it?
t3.promptTranslation: Excellent. What would you consider your strongest asset for this particular position, and could you give an example of how you've demonstrated it? — Excellent. What would you consider your strongest asset for this particular position, and could you give an example of how you've demonstrated it?

t4.prompt: I see. What specifically about this role or our company's mission attracted you to apply?
t4.promptTranslation: I see. What specifically about this role or our company's mission attracted you to apply? — I see. What specifically about this role or our company's mission attracted you to apply.

t5.prompt: Thanks for sharing. Every role has its challenges. Can you tell me about an area where you're looking to improve, or perhaps a weakness you're actively working on?
t5.promptTranslation: Thanks for sharing. Every role has its challenges. Can you tell me about an area where you're looking to improve, or perhaps a weakness you're actively working on? — Thanks for sharing. Every role has its challenges. Can you tell me about an area where you're looking to improve, or perhaps a weakness you're actively working on?

t6.prompt: Thank you. Before we wrap up, do you have any questions for me about the role, the team, or the company?
t6.promptTranslation: Thank you. Before we wrap up, do you have any questions for me about the role, the team, or the company? — Thank you. Before we wrap up, do you have any questions for me about the role, the team, or the company?

t-repeat.prompt: Sorry, could you please repeat that? I didn't quite catch what you said.
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Sorry, could you please repeat that? I didn't quite catch what you said. — Sorry, could you please repeat that? I didn't quite catch what you said.

t-end.prompt: Thank you for coming in today. We'll be in touch soon regarding the next steps. Goodbye!
t-end.promptTranslation: Thank you for coming in today. We'll be in touch soon regarding the next steps. Goodbye! — Thank you for coming in today. We'll be in touch soon regarding the next steps. Goodbye!
